notes: Modular full-auto-rated all-caliber flagship. Configurable 6.7 in K-config or 7.5 in standard. Rated 5.56 NATO through .338 Lapua Magnum. Charlie ASR direct-thread or Alpha QD compatible.
Compact 9mm pistol can. Rated up to .300 BLK subsonic and 9mm full-auto. Booster-equipped for tilting-barrel pistols; direct-thread for SMGs and PCCs.
Modular multi-caliber spanning 9mm pistol up through .45-70 and .458 SOCOM. Configurable 6.6 in or 7.8 in. Charlie ASR or Alpha QD mounting.
Hunter-focused .30-cal can. Lightweight stainless welded body, 5/8-24 direct-thread. Rated through .300 Win Mag and 6.5 PRC. Bolt-action only — not full-auto rated.
Full-auto-rated 7.62 can on the Active Spring Retention QD platform. Stellite blast baffle, MIM stainless body. Common pairing with bolt and semi-auto precision rifles.
Modular rimfire can configurable in three lengths. User-serviceable titanium baffle stack. Rated for .22 LR, .22 Mag, and .17 HMR; not centerfire-rated.
Civilian-available SOCOM-derived 5.56 can on SureFire's Fast-Attach platform. Inconel/stainless construction, full-auto rated. Pairs with SureFire muzzle devices.
5.56 NATO Fast-Attach can adopted by USSOCOM. Civilian-purchasable through normal NFA channels. Inconel construction, full-auto rated, low first-round flash.
Third-gen 7.62 Fast-Attach can. Civilian-available NFA item despite the SOCOM name. Rated through .300 Win Mag, full-auto on 7.62 NATO. Reduced back-pressure vs RC2.
Titanium-tube 9mm pistol can. User-serviceable, booster-equipped for tilting-barrel hosts. Rated 9mm subsonic through .300 BLK subsonic.
Compact precision-rifle can. All-titanium construction, available in direct-thread or CB-series QD. Bolt-action / semi-auto only — not full-auto rated. PRS-favorite for weight.
Mid-length all-titanium precision can. Direct-thread or CB-series QD. The benchmark precision-rifle suppressor for many PRS shooters; rated through .300 Win Mag.
Full-length Ultra-series. All-titanium, direct-thread or CB-series QD. Rated through .338 Lapua Magnum on bolt actions; common ELR can.
Stainless-baffled Ultra 9 variant for higher round counts and harder use. Same external footprint as Ultra 9 but more durable on hot-rod magnums and semi-auto applications.
Stainless flagship for high-round-count precision and ELR. Direct-thread or QD. Rated through .338 Lapua Magnum and proprietary cartridges in that class.
Stainless precision can introduced as the long-running .30-cal benchmark. Direct-thread only. Heavier than the Ultra series but cheaper and more durable.
User-serviceable titanium rimfire can. Full take-down for cleaning. Rated .22 LR, .22 WMR, .17 HMR; not centerfire-rated.
Short Sandman variant on Dead Air's KeyMo (key-mount) QD interface. Stellite baffles, stainless tube, full-auto rated through .300 Win Mag bolt-action.
Long Sandman with full Stellite baffle stack on the KeyMo platform. Quietest of the Sandman family at the cost of weight; rated through .300 Win Mag.
Titanium-tube Sandman with Stellite baffles. KeyMo QD. Lighter and quieter than Sandman-S; rated 5.56 through .300 Win Mag, semi-auto / bolt-action use.
Hunter / precision .30-cal can. Stellite baffles, stainless tube. Direct-thread out of the box; KeyMo QD adapter optional. Rated through .300 Win Mag bolt-action.
Lightweight titanium Nomad for hunters and PRS. Direct-thread or KeyMo QD. Rated through .300 Win Mag bolt-action; lighter than Sandman-Ti at the cost of dB.
Modular pistol-caliber can configurable in 8.7 in or 6.6 in. Rated 9mm through .45 ACP plus .300 BLK subsonic. User-serviceable baffle stack.
User-serviceable titanium rimfire can. Rated .22 LR, .22 WMR, 5.7x28, .17 HMR. Direct-thread 1/2-28.
Flow-through-architecture .30-cal can on the Clutch Lok QD interface. Reduced gas blowback for short-stroke gas guns. Rated 5.56 through .300 Win Mag.
Titanium-tube 7.62 can on Sig's Taper-Lok QD platform. Inconel baffles, full-auto rated. Common pairing with Sig MCX and Cross precision rifles.
Hybrid Inconel/titanium .338 LM-rated can on the Taper-Lok QD platform. Designed for the Sig MCX-Spear / XM7 family but civilian-available.
Modular user-serviceable 9mm pistol can. Configurable in 5-baffle or 9-baffle layout. Booster-equipped for tilting-barrel hosts; rated up to .300 BLK subsonic.
Flow-through 7.62 can on HUXWRX's HX-QD interface. Drastically reduced back-pressure for short-stroke gas guns. Rated 5.56 through .300 Win Mag, full-auto.
Direct-thread Ventum-series flow-through can. 5/8-24 thread, signature reduced gas blowback. Rated through .300 Win Mag, full-auto.
Compact K-length flow-through 7.62 can. HX-QD mount. Designed for SBRs and gas-system-sensitive hosts; rated through .300 Win Mag.
Ultralight titanium rimfire can. User-serviceable, 1/2-28 direct-thread. Rated .22 LR, .22 WMR, 5.7x28, .17 HMR.
Long-running 5.56 NATO can. Stainless welded baffle construction. Direct-thread or YHM Q.D. mount. Full-auto rated; hard-use workhorse.
User-serviceable 9mm pistol can with stainless baffles in an aluminum tube. Booster-equipped for tilting-barrel hosts; rated up to .300 BLK subsonic.
Compact titanium .30-cal can on the Cherry Bomb QD muzzle device. Lightweight precision/hunting can; rated through .300 Win Mag bolt-action.
Mid-length titanium .30-cal can on Cherry Bomb QD. Quieter sibling to Trash Panda; rated through .300 Win Mag.
Full-length Q .30/.338-class can on Cherry Bomb QD. Rated through .338 Lapua Magnum bolt-action; ELR-class titanium can.
Hybrid titanium/Inconel 7.62 can. ARC-LOK QD interface. Full-auto rated, low back-pressure architecture; rated through .300 Win Mag.
K-length Vox for SBRs and short-barreled hosts. ARC-LOK QD. Full-auto rated, gas-friendly flow-through baffle stack; rated through .300 Win Mag.
Modular titanium 9mm pistol can. User-serviceable, configurable in short or long. Booster-equipped; rated up to .300 BLK subsonic and 9mm full-auto.
All-titanium .30-cal hunter-grade can from Silencer Central. Direct-thread, rated through .300 Win Mag bolt-action. Lighter and quieter follow-on to Banish 30.
User-serviceable titanium .30-cal can. Modular 7 in or 9 in configuration. Direct-thread; rated through .300 Win Mag bolt-action.
Modular titanium pistol can. Configurable 8.6 in or 6.7 in. Booster-equipped for tilting-barrel hosts; rated 9mm through .45 ACP plus .300 BLK subsonic.
All-titanium 9mm pistol can. User-serviceable, booster-equipped. Direct-thread 1/2-28; rated 9mm through .300 BLK subsonic.
Compact K-length .30-cal can. Inconel baffles, hybrid Inconel/titanium tube. CGS QD platform; rated through .300 Win Mag, full-auto.
Modular titanium 9mm pistol can. User-serviceable, configurable in short or long. Booster-equipped; rated up to .300 BLK subsonic.
Modular .30-cal can configurable 7.5 in or 9.0 in. Rugged Dual-Taper Locking QD or direct-thread. Stellite/stainless construction; full-auto rated through .300 Win Mag.
Dedicated 5.56 NATO can. Stainless/Stellite construction, full-auto rated. Rugged Dual-Taper Locking QD or direct-thread.
Lightweight titanium 7.62 can with Stellite blast baffle. Dual-Taper Locking QD or direct-thread. Rated through .300 Win Mag; precision/hunting use.
